issues.claim: Analog does not equally apply elsewhere
issues.objection: Force-fit test for 7.25: the analog (thread 3 (yoga-māyā veiling; heavily STRETCHED)) is anchored to the verse's specific structural claim; it would not apply to a randomly chosen alternate verse. The verse's central image — for 7.25, the image specifically tied to thread 3 (yoga-māyā veiling; heavily STRETCHED) — is what the engineering scenario depends on; substituting another verse's image breaks the analog. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims a metaphysical concealment (yoga-māyā-samāvṛtaḥ). Engineering analog cannot inherit the metaphysical claim; operates at the operational scope of dashboards-as-designed-surfaces. Counter-example: senior gatekeeping is engineering pathology, not yoga-māyā at operational scope.

notes: Force-fit test for 7.25: the engineering analog cannot equally well derive from a different verse. Tags (observability, operator-system-coupling, instrumentation) are anchored on this verse's specific claim. PASS.
